zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Ferrers於1452年出生在英國盧特藍德時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth14歲，母親Lady Anne de Hastings14歲。他於1472年與Maud Stanley在英國哈普爾素坦普頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年享年33歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.Ewewood, Halifax Parish, York, England: 英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾約克
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Ferrers于1452年出生在英国盧特藍德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth14岁，母亲Lady Anne de Hastings14岁。他于1472年与Maud Stanley在英国哈普爾素坦普頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年享年33岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Ferrers was born in 1452, in Rutland, England, his father, Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth, was 14 and his mother, Lady Anne de Hastings, was 14. He married Maud Stanley in 1472, in Southampton, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1485, at the age of 33, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Ferrers est né en 1452, à Rutland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne de Hastings, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Maud Stanley en 1472, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1485, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Ferrers 1452 in Rutland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth 14 und seine Mutter Lady Anne de Hastings 14. Er hat 1472 in Southampton, Hampshire, England Maud Stanley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 33 Jahren und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Maud Stanley nel 1472, nel Southampton, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1485, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Ferrersが1452年にイギリスルトランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworthは14歳，母Lady Anne de Hastingsは14歳であった。1472年にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンでMaud Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年に33歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Ferrers(이)가 1452년 영국 루틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne de Hastings(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1472년 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 Maud Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Ferrers nasceu em 1452, em Rutland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne de Hastings, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Stanley em 1472, em Southampton, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1485, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Ferrers родился в 1452 г. в местности рутланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Ferrers 2nd Lord Tamworth было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne de Hastings, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Stanley в 1472 г. в местности соутамптон, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1485 г. в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия.
